vscode.heroDescription: AI-generated code often contains security flaws. VEXLIT catches them the moment you type and auto-fixes with a single click.
vscode.problemLine: AI-generated code contains vulnerabilities more often than you think.
vscode.featuresDesc: Everything you need for security-first development, right in your IDE.
vscode.feature1Desc: Security issues underlined in real-time. Hardcoded secrets, SQL injection, XSS detected instantly.
vscode.feature2Desc: Hover over any highlighted issue for a detailed explanation with CWE reference and suggested fix.
vscode.feature3Desc: Apply AI-generated patches directly from the editor. Context-aware fixes powered by Claude.
vscode.feature4Desc: AST-based analysis shows only real vulnerabilities. No phantom alerts, no wasted time.
vscode.feature5Desc: 200+ patterns catch API keys, tokens, and passwords before you accidentally commit them.
vscode.feature6Desc: Install and start scanning. No setup, no config files, no sign-up required.
vscode.demoTitle: See VEXLIT find and fix a vulnerability
vscode.demoDesc: Click below to see how VEXLIT detects SQL injection and generates an AI fix.
vscode.compareDesc: Use both together for maximum coverage.
vscode.howDesc: Three steps to secure code at the speed of typing.
vscode.ctaTitle: Be the first to try it
vscode.ctaDesc: We're building the VSCode extension now. Get notified when it launches.
